text:
if a planet is utterly spoilt at birth, its DaHa cannot yield
splendid results. Similarly you must note which particular house
counted from the natal Moon the lord of Dasa in transit comes
to occupy. During that period the effects will be similar to
those of ordinary transits. So too you can know as to which
particular day or days will be good or bad during a Dasa : When
the Moon in transit passes through a Sign owned by a friend of
the Daia-lord. the exaltation of the latter or the 7th house, a trine
(trikona) or an Upacaya house counted from the lord of the
Dasa, good results will be experienced. These favourable
effects would also accrue to the relations represented by the
houses counted from the ascendant. You can conclude from
this that results will not be favourable when the Moon passes
through the rest.

UPUDASAS 133
The period of a planet that has recommenced direct motion
will prove beneficial in respect of honour, valour and wealth as
